data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Sleep Corner/
data.description: Sleep Corner has recently announced a partnership with Stealth Health and Metabolic Code to enhance the availability of comprehensive sleep care services across the country. The collaboration aims to expand access to proven end-to-end sleep solutions on a national scale. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in improving sleep health, with the combined expertise of the organizations. The announcement was made on 23-Apr-2026 via a news release issued by Sleep Corner through PR Newswire. This initiative is poised to benefit a large number of individuals seeking effective sleep care, with the joint efforts of the companies.

data.title: Latin America Data Center Construction Market to Exceed USD 6.93 Billion by 2031, Supported by Google's $500M Digital Port Investment - Arizton
data.description: Chicago, April 23, 2026 - A recent industry analysis report by Arizton forecasts significant growth in the Latin America data center construction market, with expectations to reach USD 6.93 billion by 2031. The report covers regional outlook, growth potential, price trends, competitive market share, and a forecast for the period of 2026-2031.

data.title: White House Correspondents' Dinner: Hollywood stars, reporters, and politicians gather for press freedom in annual black-tie event.
data.description: Every year, a prestigious black-tie affair draws the attention of Hollywood celebrities, journalists, and government officials, gathering for a night filled with humor and reverence for the importance of press freedom.
Reports claiming Iran collected Hormuz fees in cryptocurrency are incorrect - Fars News

data.title: OnePay Launches Builder Card, a Smarter Way for Millions to Build Credit Without Late Fees or Interest
data.description: New York, April 23, 2026 - A recent development in the financial landscape offers a solution to the credit challenges faced by many Americans, particularly the younger demographic. This innovative approach eliminates the need for credit checks, revolving debt, and late or monthly fees. With no credit history, numerous individuals are often rejected when seeking credit opportunities. However, this new system presents a way forward for these individuals. This advancement is poised to benefit millions, helping them establish credit without the traditional hindrances, offering a pathway to financial progress.

data.title: NOYZ UNVEILS "BE HER" EAU DE PARFUM IN PARTNERSHIP WITH ELLA LANGLEY
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Los Angeles, renowned fragrance brand NOYZ revealed an unprecedented collaboration with popular country singer Ella Langley. This unique partnership resulted in the creation of Be Her Eau de Parfum, a scent that encapsulates the essence of Langley's chart-topping music. The fragrance is set to captivate consumers with its innovative approach to blending musical inspiration with olfactory artistry.

data.title: Lakewood-Amedex Biotherapeutics Announces Direct Listing on Nasdaq; Shares Trading Under the Symbol "LABT"
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida on April 23, 2026, Lakewood-Amedex Biotherapeutics Inc. announced advancements in their research on a new class of antimicrobials, Bisphosphocin®, designed to combat infectious diseases. The company, traded on NASDAQ as LABT, is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm. This novel class of antimicrobials is noted for its potent and rapid-acting nature, with broad-spectrum capabilities.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- dbt Labs/
data.description: dbt Labs has been announced as the recipient of the 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year Award in a news release dated April 21, 2026. The announcement was made by dbt Labs through PR Newswire, revealing important updates. The revised release confirms dbt Labs' achievement in winning the prestigious award. Further information can be found towards the end of the release for additional insights.

data.title: Molina Healthcare of Iowa and The MolinaCares Accord Donate $100,000 to Support Senior Nutrition Food Program
data.description: In Waterloo, Iowa, Molina Healthcare of Iowa and The MolinaCares Accord have contributed $100,000 to aid a senior nutrition food program.

data.title: FTX estate loses out on $3B Cursor stake value after $200K sale in 2023, sparking concerns over bankruptcy asset liquidation.
data.description: In 2023, the FTX estate sold its Cursor stake for $200,000. Recently, the value of this stake has surged to $3 billion due to a SpaceX-linked valuation increase. This substantial growth has sparked concerns regarding asset sales during bankruptcy proceedings.

data.title: OKX speeds up US expansion by integrating BitGo for off-exchange settlement, reducing pre-funding requirements for institutions.
data.description: OKX has partnered with BitGo to incorporate off-exchange settlement services for institutional traders in the US. This move will significantly decrease pre-funding requirements for users. It is a significant advancement in OKX's expansion in the US market after receiving investment from ICE.

data.title: Eric Trump, Michael Saylor, and Anatoly Yakovenko lead Consensus Miami 2026 with 20,000 attendees merging finance and Miami nightlife.
data.description: The leading festival in the industry is set to welcome 20,000 participants, combining traditional finance elements with Miami's exceptional nightlife scene.

data.title: USDM1 now Available on Anchorage Digital, Expanding Institutional Access to Natively-Issued, Treasury-Backed Sovereign Collateral
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Anchorage Digital unveiled USDM1, the first federally regulated crypto bank in the U.S., introducing a U.S. dollar-denominated sovereign debt instrument. This blockchain-native asset is collateralized in a 1:1 ratio by U.S. Treasury instruments.

data.title: Havis Expands Rugged Mobility Solutions with New Docking Stations for Getac G140 Tablet
data.description: A sturdy docking solution designed to provide dependable connectivity, security, and performance in tough public sector and industrial settings has been introduced. The product is from Havis, a renowned company specializing in rugged vehicle mounting and mobility. Released in Warminster, Pennsylvania, the solution offers high durability and functionality for demanding environments.

Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders approve sale to Paramount Skydance

data.title: Strengthening the Future of the Colorado River: Grundfos Takes Co‑Champion Role to Drive Investment and Action
data.description: Grundfos, a company based in Brookshire, Texas, has recently taken on a leadership role as a co-champion within the Water Resilience Coalition dedicated to the Colorado River Basin. This initiative aims to address water-related challenges in the region by promoting sustainable practices and collaboration among stakeholders. Grundfos' involvement is expected to bring valuable expertise and resources to support the coalition's efforts in ensuring the resilience of water resources in the basin.

data.title: Allsteel Unveils Newly Reimagined Boston Showroom Design
data.description: The company has launched a new experiential space that focuses on human-centric design, emphasizing choice, digital equity, and adaptability. This innovative space aims to cater to the needs of customers by offering a unique and interactive experience. The design is centered around providing options, ensuring fair access to technology, and the ability to adjust to different circumstances. This initiative underscores the importance of user experience and inclusivity in today's rapidly evolving digital landscape.
